<!--
  Pull request template. Fill in each section so the reviewer has the context
  they need. Delete any guidance comments before submitting.
-->

## What & why

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? Link any related issue/ticket. -->



## Areas of the store affected

<!-- Tick everything this PR could touch. This drives how carefully
     the reviewer needs to test. -->

- [ ] Front-end / theme section (visual, content, layout)
- [ ] Cart
- [ ] Checkout
- [ ] Theme settings / customiser schema
- [ ] Build tooling / config (Vite, package.json, CI)
- [ ] Other (describe below)



## How I tested it

<!-- What did you actually run/click? Include store/theme, devices or browsers,
     and any edge cases (e.g. no products selected, product with no image). -->



## What the reviewer needs to test

<!-- Give the reviewer a concrete checklist. What should they verify, and where?
     Call out anything risky or easy to miss. -->

- [ ] 
- [ ] 


## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- Optional, but helpful for anything visual. Before/after where relevant. -->
